a_short_abstract_summary_of_the_topic: A short abstract summary of the topic
bang_redirect_url_populated_only_for_ban: !bang redirect URL, populated only for bang queries
check_a_stated_claim_against_duckduckgo_: Check a stated claim against DuckDuckGo results to confirm or flag it as unsupported.
plain_text_version_of_the_abstract: Plain text version of the abstract
remove_html_from_text_in_results: Remove HTML from text in results
response_type_a_d_c_n_e: Response type (A, D, C, N, E)
search_duckduckgo_for_a_quick_instant_an: Search DuckDuckGo for a quick instant answer or abstract on a topic and return it with its source.
search_the_web_using_duckduckgo_instant_: Search the web using DuckDuckGo Instant Answers API. Returns instant answers, abstracts, related topics, and more. Free to use without an API key.
the_heading_title_of_the_instant_answer: The heading/title of the instant answer
url_to_an_image_related_to_the_topic: URL to an image related to the topic
url_to_the_source_of_the_abstract: URL to the source of the abstract
url_to_the_source_of_the_definition: URL to the source of the definition
use_duckduckgo_to_collect_related_topics: Use DuckDuckGo to collect related topics and external links around a subject for research.
